final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for the Changan Origin Q06 vehicle launch announcement.

Style/medium: needs a "通透震撼" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product keynote visuals, 2020s Chinese EV brand launch aesthetics (NIO/XPeng/理想), cinematic automotive photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include primary title centered or upper-third, secondary subtitle below, with generous negative space for text legibility
Subject: must include the vehicle "长安起源Q06" as the focal subject or implied through the theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a translucent, impactful backdrop — exact environment and atmosphere are yours
Lighting/mood: needs an impactful, premium atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brand-aligned direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined, premium surface treatment — exact gloss / transparency / depth is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" as primary title; subtitle text is yours
Constraints: must preserve the September launch timing, must work as a PPT cover (16:9 aspect ratio, text-safe zones)
Avoid:
